allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./leaders.json''\); Object.keys\(d.leaders\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k, d.leaders[k].length, ''entries, max rank:'', Math.max\(...d.leaders[k].map\(e=>e.rank||0\)\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./client/public/data/scores.json''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(typeof d.games, Array.isArray\(d\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./client/public/data/scores.json''\); const games = d.scores; const mar17 = games.filter\(g => g.date === ''2026-03-17''\); console.log\(''Mar 17 games:'', mar17.length\); mar17.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(g => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(g\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./client/public/data/scores.json''\); console.log\(''Total games:'', d.scores.length\); const dates = [...new Set\(d.scores.map\(g => g.date\)\)].sort\(\(a,b\) => new Date\(b\)-new Date\(a\)\); console.log\(''Unique dates:'', dates.length\); console.log\(''First 10:'', dates.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\(''Last 10:'', dates.slice\(-10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./client/public/data/scores.json''\); const mar17 = d.scores.filter\(g => g.date === ''Mar 17, 2026''\); console.log\(''Mar 17 games:'', mar17.length\); mar17.forEach\(g => console.log\(g.visitingTeam, g.visitingScore, ''at'', g.homeTeam, g.homeScore, ''| gameId:'', g.gameId\)\);")
